title: Improve Cockpit and CLI trust presentation

sources.reason: Defines CLI and Cockpit presentation acceptance.
Current report and markdown rendering boundary.

riskAssessment.reason: Presentation must remain generated and agree with machine-readable report state.

executionDecision.reason: User explicitly authorized the sequential Trust Layer execution plan.

preReviewWarnings: Generated status and CLI output must agree with the report state.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: CLI output exposes status, recommendation, decision, and resume condition.
Generated Cockpit status exposes machine-readable signal state without hand edits.
Golden output and exit-state tests pass.
Summary and generated status remain consistent.
guidelines: Generated status must never be hand-edited.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Trust signals exist in JSON and markdown but do not have a compact presentation summary for reviewers to compare report state, recommendation, decision, and resume condition.
constraints: Preserve machine-readable fields and exit-state semantics.
intent.rationale: A consistent presentation boundary lets reviewers understand stop, review, and resume states without reading implementation details.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
